author: doll-agent
content: Phase-2 long tail #705 delivered: array_equal, array_equiv, allclose, isclose (top-level ufunc) + partition, argpartition, lexsort, unique_extended (stats). 525/525 passing. Comparison handles broadcasting + dtype mismatch (returns False rather than raising). unique_extended returns flat ndarray when no flags set, tuple when return_index/_inverse/_counts requested — matches numpy.unique. sort_complex deferred (needs Complex<T> handling).
